scan_note: bioRxiv API and website blocked by egress proxy; used WebSearch for discovery

new_papers.title: The Incoming Influenza Genome Assembles a Host RBP Network
new_papers.score_rationale: Direct host-pathogen interaction mapping. ~700 host RBPs identified via VIR-CLASP. GMPS, TOP2A, SRRM2, SPEN as proviral factors. Novel technique, strong experimental evidence.

new_papers.title: Haemagglutinin 162-164 deletions enhance influenza B/Victoria virus fitness and virulence in vivo
new_papers.score_rationale: Molecular virology - HA structural deletions affecting IBV fitness and pathogenesis. Relevant to viral mechanisms but IBV (not IAV) and limited host factor interaction detail.

new_papers.title: Efficient replication of influenza D virus in the human airway underscores zoonotic potential
new_papers.score_rationale: IDV replication in human airway - zoonotic potential. Relevant to host tropism but IDV not IAV/IBV, and focus is on replication characterization rather than molecular interactions.

new_papers.title: Hybrid alphavirus-influenza pseudovirions for neutralization antibody quantification
new_papers.score_rationale: Tool/assay paper. H5N1 pseudovirus system. No novel HPMI mechanisms.

new_papers.title: Innate antiviral readiness drives the expansion of protective T stem cell memory against influenza
new_papers.score_rationale: pDC-associated IFN-I signature predicts TSCM expansion and viral clearance. Interesting immunology but operates at cellular/systems level rather than molecular interaction level.

new_papers.title: Emergence and antigenic characterisation of influenza A(H3N2) viruses with substitutions at positions 158 and 189
new_papers.score_rationale: Antigenic drift characterization. Surveillance-focused. Limited molecular host-pathogen interaction detail.

new_papers.title: H5 influenza virus mRNA-LNP vaccine in lactating dairy cows
new_papers.score_rationale: Vaccine study. No novel molecular host-pathogen interactions.

new_papers.title: Recombinant influenza A H5N1 viruses expressing fluorescent and luminescent reporter proteins
new_papers.score_rationale: Tool paper - reporter viruses for H5N1 clade 2.3.4.4b. Useful reagent but no novel HPMI findings.
